message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Family and Social Change in West Germany 1984","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.2451","justification":"Includes questions on marriage, partnership, divorce, and family life in West Germany in the mid‑1980s."},{"title":"Family and Social Change in West Germany 1988","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.2452","justification":"Follow‑up to the 1984 study covering marriage, family formation, and household structures in West Germany in the late 1980s."},{"title":"German General Social Survey (ALLBUS) 1980","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13340","justification":"ALLBUS 1980 contains modules on family situation, marital status, and partnership patterns in Germany at the start of the 1980s."},{"title":"German General Social Survey (ALLBUS) 1982","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13341","justification":"Includes indicators on marriage, cohabitation, children, and family roles in early‑1980s Germany."},{"title":"German General Social Survey (ALLBUS) 1984","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13342","justification":"Covers family status, marriage, division of household labor, and attitudes toward family roles in mid‑1980s Germany."},{"title":"German General Social Survey (ALLBUS) 1986","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13343","justification":"Provides repeated measures on marital status, family composition, and partnership issues in Germany during the mid‑1980s."},{"title":"German General Social Survey (ALLBUS) 1988","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13344","justification":"Late‑1980s ALLBUS wave with variables on marriage, family, fertility, and gender‑role attitudes in Germany."},{"title":"German General Social Survey (ALLBUS) 1990","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13345","justification":"Wave fielded around German unification, covering the tail end of the 1980s; includes extensive information on marital status and family life in East and West Germany."},{"title":"Population Policy Acceptance Study (PPAS) Germany 1988 – Family and Fertility Survey","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.4871","justification":"Focuses on fertility intentions, marriage, partnership, and family policies in late‑1980s Germany."},{"title":"Microcensus 1987 – Scientific Use File (Germany)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA8100","justification":"Large‑scale household survey with detailed information on marital status, household composition, and family structures in Germany in 1987."}]}
